description: Foundation primitives for all domain models - Entity, Person, Time, Money, Address, etc.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release - Entity, Individual, Person, Organization, Time (TimePoint, Duration, DateRange, Recurrence), Money, Address, GeoLocation, ContactInfo, Quantity, MediaObject, Status, Identifier

notes: This is the foundation layer. All other domains should import from core rather than redefining these primitives.
